title: BEYOND HORIZONS (IV COMPAT)
description: Beyond Horizons IV adds full long-distance rendering for Immersive Vehicles (IV)
body:
### WHAT IS BEYOND HORIZONS IV?

Beyond Horizons IV is an expansion mod that allows Immersive Vehicles (IV) vehicles to be seen far beyond the normal render distance.
This mod must be installed on both the client and the server.

### How does it work?

Beyond Horizons IV creates and renders a lightweight “ghost” version of distant IV vehicles.
These ghost vehicles smoothly scale with distance and maintain their shape, direction, and motion, allowing aircraft, tanks, cars, and other IV vehicles to remain visible even at extreme ranges.


### MOD REQUIRES DISTANT HORIZONS

If your pc cant run distant horizons go into the DH Menu and disable rendering it will fix the issue with things disappearing 

also yes you may use this in your modpack

and yes there will be more versions coming soon
